home.helpSectionLead: What do you need right now?
home.manualBlockLead: Short chapters for the first weeks home.
home.statementBody: We're glad you're here — you're not the only one. Short, honest guides for the first months of motherhood, when there's no time to read a book and no one to ask at 3 a.m.
home.statementA11y: Open the Manual — short guides for the first year
home.exploreSpecialistsSub: Trusted help, when you need it.
home.featuredTitle: The first six weeks, in your own time.
home.featuredExcerpt: A gentle map of recovery, feeding, and the very small wins that count.
home.crisisCardTitle: If today feels like too much
home.crisisCardBody: The first weeks are the hardest. Real support — text, call, or chat — is one tap away, day or night.
home.crisisCardSheetLead: You don't have to be in crisis to use these. They're free, confidential, and trained for new moms.
home.dischargeWelcomeBody: The first six weeks are the hardest — and the most important. We'll keep recovery, feeding, and emotional check-ins close so you can find what you need without searching.

checkin.heading: How are you today?
checkin.notesPlaceholder: Skip this if you don't feel like typing.
checkin.disclaimer: This is a check-in, not medical advice. If anything feels urgent, call your provider or 911. For mental-health support, call or text 988.
checkin.responseCrisisBody: Based on what you shared, please reach out now. You don't have to wait, and you're not alone.
checkin.responseFallbackReply: Thanks for checking in — we couldn't reach our assistant right now. If something feels urgent, call your provider or 911.

discover.heading: Where to next?

anonMode.title: Anonymous mode
anonMode.lead: When you join a Community room, you can show up under a warm, anonymous handle instead of your real name. Privacy by default — opt in below, then we'll generate a fresh handle every time you join a new room.
anonMode.toggleDesc: Newly joined rooms auto-generate an anonymous handle for you. Rooms you're already in keep whatever name you've been using.
anonMode.previewLabel: WHAT YOUR HANDLE COULD LOOK LIKE
anonMode.previewHint: This is just a preview — not saved. Tap regenerate to see another.
anonMode.previewError: Couldn't generate a preview. Try again in a moment.
anonMode.how1: Each handle is unique within its room. No two people share an alias in the same conversation.
anonMode.how2: We don't track your handle to anything that identifies you. Moderators see real identities only when responding to a safety flag (988 crisis, abuse report).
anonMode.how3: You get a different handle in every room — your aliases don't connect across rooms.
anonMode.how4: You can regenerate your handle in any room from that room's settings.
anonMode.footerHint: Anonymous mode is foundation work — Community rooms aren't open to users yet. When they ship, your settings here will already be in place.

notifPrefs.lead: Choose which nudges you get. Safety-critical messages (like crisis resources or account-status updates) are always delivered.
notifPrefs.rowEventsDesc: Reminders for RSVPs, new local events, and upcoming webinars.
notifPrefs.rowGroupsDesc: Weekly digests from the rooms you've joined.
notifPrefs.rowSpecialistsDesc: Reminders before your appointments and confirmations from your specialist.
notifPrefs.rowMilkHubDesc: Order updates, pickup reminders, and messages from donors.
notifPrefs.rowArticlesDesc: New stage-relevant content as your week advances.
notifPrefs.rowAiDesc: Weekly milestone explainers and daily check-in reminders.
notifPrefs.rowPromotionsDesc: Occasional promotions from villie brand partners.
notifPrefs.rowPromotionsNote: Off by default. Turning this on opts you in to receive marketing messages.
notifPrefs.rowNewsletterDesc: One email a week, Sunday morning. Top video for your stage, your saved list, and the crisis hotlines in the footer.
notifPrefs.rowNewsletterNote: Off by default. We never share your email. One-click unsubscribe in every send.
notifPrefs.quietHoursDesc: Appointment reminders and community digests wait until quiet hours end. Crisis messages are always delivered.
notifPrefs.footer: You can unsubscribe from any email at the bottom of the message. Push and SMS preferences can be changed here at any time.

account.pwSub: Pick a new password for your account. You'll stay signed in on this device.
account.pwTooShort: Password must be at least {{n}} characters.
account.pwUpdatedBody: Your password has been changed. Use it next time you sign in.
account.emSub: We'll send a confirmation link to your new address. The change takes effect once you tap that link.
account.emInvalid: Enter a valid email like you@example.com.
account.emConfirmBody: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Tap the link from that email to finish the change. Until then, keep using {{current}} to sign in.
account.emDisclaimer: Heads up: Supabase may also send a notice to your old email so you know the change was requested. Until you confirm in the new inbox, sign-in keeps using your current address.
account.delSub: This is permanent. Read what happens before you confirm.
account.delWhatHappens1: Your profile becomes invisible across villie.
account.delWhatHappens2: You'll be signed out on this device.
account.delWhatHappens3: Your saved specialists, donors, and gear lists will no longer be visible to you.
account.delWhatHappens4: Active gear listings and milk listings will be withdrawn so no one can message or buy.
account.delRetainedBody: Some records are retained by law: completed milk transactions (tax + dispute audit), gear-listing safety trail (CPSC recall enforcement under CPSIA §19), and compliance event logs. Personal details on those rows are scrubbed; the rows themselves are kept for the legally required period.
account.delPhraseA11y: Type the word {{word}} to confirm deletion
account.delDisclaimer: This action cannot be undone. If you change your mind later, you'll need to sign up as a new user.
account.delConfirmBody: This is your last chance to cancel. Tap “Yes, delete” to remove your account.
account.delErrorBody: Please try again, or contact support if this keeps happening.

radius.help: Applies to nearby specialists, donors, events, and gear. You can always narrow the radius from each tab's filter.

help.greeting: Hey, I'm villie — your in-app helper. Ask me how to book a donor, find a specialist, track your orders, or anything else about using villie. I'm not a doctor though — for medical concerns I'll point you to the right place.

milk.homeSub: Safely connect donors with moms who need breast milk.
milk.bannerSub: Donor milk shared safely between moms in your community.
milk.matchSub: Get ranked donors based on diet, distance, and trust.

milk.safetyNote: 🔒 All milk sharing is peer-to-peer between consenting adults. villie does not provide medical advice. Consult your pediatrician before using donor milk.

milkDispute.title: Report an issue
milkDispute.subRecipient: We'll review your report and contact both you and {{name}}. Opening a dispute pauses the order from closing while we investigate.
milkDispute.subDonor: We'll review your report and contact both you and {{name}}. Opening a dispute pauses the order from closing while we investigate.
milkDispute.reasonNeverReceivedHelper: The donor did not show up or did not ship as agreed.
milkDispute.reasonQualityHelper: The milk appeared off in color, smell, or condition on arrival.
milkDispute.reasonSpoiledHelper: The milk was thawed or spoiled on arrival.
milkDispute.reasonWrongQtyHelper: I received a different amount than I ordered.
milkDispute.reasonNoShowHelper: The recipient did not arrive for the scheduled pickup.
milkDispute.reasonOtherHelper: Describe the issue in your own words below.
milkDispute.textareaPlaceholder: Describe what happened, when, and anything we should know to help resolve this.
milkDispute.noteBody:
• The other party is notified that a concern was raised.
• villie reviews the order history, messages, and any evidence.
• For spoiled or never-received milk, refunds are issued per our dispute policy.
• If you need urgent medical help, call 911 or your pediatrician.
milkDispute.selectReasonBody: Pick the option that best describes the issue.
milkDispute.moreDetailBody: Please describe what happened in at least {{min}} characters. This helps us resolve the dispute fairly.
milkDispute.alreadyReportedBody: A dispute is already open on this order. Our team will follow up with both parties.
milkDispute.thanksBody: Your report has been recorded. Our team will reach out to both parties within 2 business days.

donorQuestionnaire.profileReviewBody: One of your answers requires a safety review. Your listing has been paused and our team will reach out within 24 hours.
donorQuestionnaire.errorBody: Could not save your responses. Please try again.
donorQuestionnaire.qBreastfeedingDuration: How long have you been breastfeeding or pumping?
donorQuestionnaire.qSmoking: Do you currently smoke, vape, or use any tobacco or nicotine products?
donorQuestionnaire.qAlcohol: How often do you consume alcohol?
donorQuestionnaire.qPrescriptionMeds: Are you currently taking any prescription medications?
donorQuestionnaire.qSupplements: Do you take any supplements, vitamins, or herbal remedies?
donorQuestionnaire.qInfectiousIllness: Have you had any infectious illness (COVID, flu, mastitis) in the past 30 days?
donorQuestionnaire.qBloodbornePathogens: Have you ever tested positive for HIV, Hepatitis B, Hepatitis C, or HTLV?
donorQuestionnaire.qCaffeine: How much caffeine do you consume daily?
donorQuestionnaire.qRecreationalDrugs: Do you use marijuana, CBD, or any recreational substances?
donorQuestionnaire.qVaccinations: Have you received any vaccines in the past 30 days?
donorQuestionnaire.qStoragePractices: How do you store your expressed milk before sharing?
donorQuestionnaire.qBloodworkConsent: Are you willing to share bloodwork results for our Verified Bloodwork badge? This significantly increases recipient trust.

milkShippingLabel.alreadyPurchasedBody: A label was already bought for this order.
milkShippingLabel.readySub: Drop the package at any USPS location.
milkShippingLabel.title: Buy shipping label
milkShippingLabel.intro: We purchase a USPS Priority Mail label via Shippo. Pack the milk frozen with insulation and dry ice, then drop it at any USPS location. The recipient gets a tracking SMS.
milkShippingLabel.disclaimer: villie does not ship, handle, or insure donor milk. Shippo is a third-party shipping label provider. Shipping of human milk is the donor's and recipient's responsibility.

trustBadge.medsSub: List any prescription meds, supplements, or herbs. Leave empty if you take none.

payment.title: Payment
payment.info: Your appointment will be confirmed immediately after payment. You'll receive a confirmation with all details.
payment.errInitConnBody: We couldn’t reach our servers. Check your connection and try again.
payment.errInitServerBody: Our payment service had a hiccup setting this up. Please try again.
payment.errInitGenericBody: Could not initialize payment. Please try again.
payment.errInsufficientBody: Your card was declined for insufficient funds. Try a different card.
payment.errExpiredBody: That card has expired. Please use a different card.
payment.errCvcBody: The security code on the back of your card didn’t match. Please try again.
payment.errDeclinedBody: Your bank declined this charge. You may want to try a different card or call your bank.
payment.errAuthBody: Your bank needs to verify this charge. Tap Pay again and complete the authentication.
payment.errTimeoutBody: We didn’t hear back in time. Please check your connection and try again. No charge was made.
payment.errFailedBody: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again. No charge was made.
payment.errGenericBody: Please try again, or use a different card.
payment.errFatalBody: Please email {{email}} if you were charged.

reviewSubmit.title: Write a Review

reviewSubmit.disclaimer: Reviews are public and help moms in your village find great care. We never share your full name.
reviewSubmit.errRatingBody: Please tap a star to rate this provider.
reviewSubmit.errOopsBody: Could not submit your review. Please try again.

gearProhibitedBlock.headline: Can't list this item
gearProhibitedBlock.subTrailing: We don't accept those on Villie — this isn't a strike on your account, just a category we can't safely host.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_car_seat: Car seats expire and have invisible damage after even minor crashes. Resale carries safety and liability risk that no marketplace can responsibly take on.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_breast_pump: Breast pumps are FDA-regulated single-user medical devices. The FDA does not allow resale of personal-use pumps.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_sleep_positioner: Sleep positioners have been linked to infant deaths and are not recommended by any pediatric authority.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_inclined_sleeper: Inclined sleepers were banned under the federal Safe Sleep for Babies Act (2022) after multiple infant deaths.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_helmet: Helmets sustain invisible structural damage from impacts. Even a helmet that looks unused may no longer protect.
gearProhibitedBlock.reason_generic: This category of item carries safety risks we won't expose families to. The Gear Marketplace Addendum (in your account → Account & security) lists every prohibited category and why.
gearProhibitedBlock.policyExplainer: Villie uses an automated check on every photo at upload to catch prohibited items even when they're listed under a different category. If you believe this is a mistake — the photo got mis-identified, or the item is similar but not actually prohibited — close this and try a different photo or category. Items that are clearly safe will not be blocked.

gearCreate.title: New listing
gearCreate.prohibitedBody1: Car seats, breast pumps, sleep positioners, inclined sleepers, and helmets cannot be resold here.
gearCreate.identifyPhotoA11yIdle: Identify item from photo using AI
gearCreate.identifyPhotoA11yEmpty: Identify from photo, add a photo first
gearCreate.noteSavedNoApi: UPC saved. (No product database connected yet — please fill in the rest.)
gearCreate.noteSavedNoMatch: UPC saved. No product match — please fill in the rest.
gearCreate.addPhotoFirstBody: Take or pick a photo, then we can identify it.
gearCreate.noteVisionFailedItem: Couldn't identify the item — please fill in manually.
gearCreate.noteVisionConfidence: Identified by AI ({{pct}}% confidence). Review before posting.
gearCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: Condition notes, accessories included, why you're selling...
gearCreate.legalNote: By listing, you confirm this item is not on the prohibited list and you are the owner. villie does not verify sellers, condition, or safety claims.
gearCreate.errLocationBody: We need your approximate location so buyers can see distance.
gearCreate.errLimitBody: You can add up to {{max}} photos.
gearCreate.errTitleShort: Title must be at least 4 characters.
gearCreate.errDescShort: Description must be at least 20 characters.
gearCreate.errYearToy: Toys from before 1978 cannot be listed (CPSIA lead-paint rule).
gearCreate.errYearCrib: Cribs from before 2011 cannot be listed (CPSC drop-side rule).
gearCreate.errAgeRequired: Pick at least one age range.
gearCreate.errPriceInvalid: Enter a valid price, or mark as Free.
gearCreate.errLocationRequired: Tap "Use my location" so buyers can see distance.

milkSafeHandoff.headline: Arranging a milk pickup
milkSafeHandoff.subhead: Villie connects donors and recipients. We do not test milk, process payments, or take part in the handoff. Please read before you reach out. Scroll to the bottom to continue.
milkSafeHandoff.s1Title: Meet in a public, agreed-upon place
milkSafeHandoff.s1Body: Choose a well-lit public location — a grocery-store parking lot, a coffee shop, or another spot you both feel safe in. If you offer your home, bring someone with you or share your live location with a friend during the handoff.
milkSafeHandoff.s2Title: Bring a cooler with frozen packs
milkSafeHandoff.s2Body: Donor milk should stay frozen during transport. Bring a small cooler with two or three frozen ice packs. Move the milk straight from the donor's freezer to your cooler, and into your own freezer within the time the CDC recommends for safe handling.
milkSafeHandoff.s3Title: Inspect the milk before you take it
milkSafeHandoff.s3Body: Check that each bag or bottle is sealed, frozen solid, and labeled with the pump date. Look for clear, intact packaging — no torn bags, no thawed-and-refrozen ice crystals, no off color or smell. If anything looks wrong, walk away. You can decline at the meeting with no obligation.
milkSafeHandoff.s4Title: Cash or peer-to-peer at the handoff
milkSafeHandoff.s4Body: Villie does not process payments. Settle in cash, or via a peer app (Venmo / Zelle / Apple Cash) at the time of pickup. Never wire money in advance, never share bank-account, SSN, or card details with a donor, and never agree to a price that feels coercive.
milkSafeHandoff.s5Body: If a donor pressures you, won't meet in public, changes the story, refuses to let you inspect the milk, or insists on an unusual payment method — walk away. No arrangement is worth your or your baby's safety.
milkSafeHandoff.s6Body:
• Leave the meeting immediately and call 911 if you feel unsafe.
• If your baby shows signs of illness after a feeding, stop and contact your pediatrician right away.
• Tap "Report" from the donor's profile — we review flagged donors within 24 hours.
• Villie is a platform, not a party to the transaction. We cooperate with law enforcement on valid requests.
milkSafeHandoff.scrollCue: You've reached the end. Tap "I understand" to message the donor.
